productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Diego Grey Running Sports Shoe
description: adidas Diego, a part of the adidas Liestrike line, is a pair of shoes for Sports junkies. Styled in sophisticated design, cut a dash with this pair at any sport event. Wear them with shorts and your favourite tee. Upper Mesh upper with synthetic leather overlay Adidas patented 3-Stripes on the sides of the midfoot Reinforced overlay for the heel cup and toe box for additional comfort Central lacing system Padded tongue and collar for instep comfort Removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic Midsole EVA Litestrike midsole for lightweight comfort Outsole TPR outsole with a decoupled heel for impact protection Impact line along the outsole for spreading shock evenly Block grooves and lightning shaped lugs for grip and traction shoe care Use a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean Do not store under sunlight
